command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.202 "cat > /tmp/check_gateway.sh << 'SHEOF'
cd /home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent
/home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent/venv/bin/hermes gateway run --help 2>&1
echo ---
# Check if gateway exposes any HTTP after being running a bit
sudo systemctl status hermes-gateway --no-pager | head -5
ss -tlnp
SHEOF
bash /tmp/check_gateway.sh"
